/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/cache_simulator.dir/src/Decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cache_simulator.dir/src/Loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cache_simulator.dir/src/cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cache_simulator.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cache_simulator.dir/src/memory.cpp.o -o cache_simulator
